title: Retrospective Goal Payload
description: The retrospective-specific payload used on evaluate goals submitted through `pak2 retrospective` or `system.submit.submit_retrospective_goal()`.

window.description: Window-selection policy for the retrospective evidence set.

recent_run_limit.description: Fallback cap on substantive closed runs when no prior retrospective boundary exists.

action_boundary.description: Whether this retrospective stays observe-only or may queue one bounded follow-up goal.
